prompt: Photorealistic 3D render of a solid volumetric rounded cube (superellipsoid / squircle cube) rendered in Blender Cycles with full physically-based materials and global illumination. CRITICAL PERSPECTIVE: the cube is rotated 30 degrees on the Y axis and 20 degrees on the X axis, viewed from a 3/4 camera position showing three faces clearly with strong perspective depth. The edges are heavily rounded/beveled giving it a soft premium toy-like quality. MATERIAL: smooth glossy plastic-like surface with a cyan-to-electric-blue gradient — deep saturated cyan #00B4D8 on the shadowed faces, transitioning through bright aqua #00E3FF on the mid-tones, up to soft white-cyan #B8F3FF on the top highlights facing the light. The material has subtle subsurface scattering giving it a translucent glow, plus sharp specular highlights where the light hits directly. WIREFRAME OVERLAY: a precise thin white wireframe mesh (#FFFFFF at 70% opacity) wraps the entire cube surface, following the topology of the rounded cube with evenly spaced grid lines on each face. The wireframe follows the curvature with perfect perspective. The mesh density is moderate and uniform. LIGHTING: main three-point lighting setup — strong key light from upper-left creating bright highlights on the top-left face and a soft shadow on the bottom-right; fill light from the right side softening the shadow; rim light from behind creating a subtle edge glow. BACKGROUND: pure black #000000, completely solid black with no gradient, no glow, just absolute darkness. A very subtle contact shadow appears directly beneath the cube. COMPOSITION: cube centered with generous negative space, framed as a premium brand decorative asset. Crisp edges, high anti-aliasing, no noise, no blur. Must read immediately as 3D with real volume and depth.
